KXNFLGAME-26SEP13ATLPIT-ATL.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional football game originally scheduled for Sep 13, 2026. If the game is postponed but begins within 48 hours from its originally scheduled start time, the market will remain open and resolve based on the official final result. If the game is not started within 48 hours, the market will resolve to a fair market price.
